english_text: I am jealous
I feel envious of them
Why are you talking to them?
I do not like you hanging out with them
Are you hiding something from me?
Who were you talking to?
I saw you looking at them
You never do that for me
They always get everything
I want what they have
Why do they get all the attention?
That should have been mine
I cannot help feeling jealous
It bothers me when you do that
Am I not enough for you?
I feel insecure about us
They are always showing off
I wish I had their talent
Why does everything come easy to them?
I feel like I am not good enough
Stop making me jealous
I am green with envy
They did not deserve that
I worked harder than them
Life is so unfair
I am happy for them but also jealous
Why do you keep mentioning them?
I wish I was in their position
Their success makes me uncomfortable
I compare myself to others too much
Jealousy is eating me up
I know I should not be jealous but
Why did you like their photo?
You seem to like them more than me
korean_text: 나보다 걔가 더 좋은 것 같아
romanization: naboda gyaega deo joeun geot gata

english_text: I am trying not to be jealous
It is natural to feel jealous sometimes
I admit I am envious
They have it so easy
I feel left behind
Everyone else is doing well
I want to be as good as them
Why was I not invited?
They always get picked first
I feel like the odd one out
I deserve that too
Do not compare me to them
Jealousy only hurts yourself
I need to focus on myself
Their happiness is not my loss
I should be happy with what I have
Comparison is the thief of joy
I will use jealousy as motivation
Everyone has their own pace
My turn will come
I am grateful for what I have
Being envious is normal
I will become better than yesterday
The grass is always greener
I choose to be happy for them
Let me celebrate my own wins
